message:
fix(algorithms): correct node connectivity cut computation, assortativity NaN handling, and add pairwise connectivity APIs

- Fix minimum_node_cut_directed to use backward reachability from sink
  in the residual graph instead of forward reachability from source,
  producing correct minimum vertex cuts via cut-edge extraction
- Change node-split auxiliary graph edge capacities from large_cap
  (n+1) to 1.0 for both directed and undirected variants, matching
  the node connectivity formulation
- Return f64::NAN instead of 0.0 for degree and numeric assortativity
  coefficient when denominator is near-zero (degenerate graphs)
- Add edge_connectivity_edmonds_karp_directed for pairwise directed
  edge connectivity
- Extend Python node_connectivity() and edge_connectivity() bindings
  to accept optional (s, t) source/target pairs, with validation
- Add cutoff parameter stub to edge_connectivity with NotImplemented
  error
- Reformat Dijkstra destructuring patterns (rustfmt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
